items.title: League announces Bam Adebayo as the 2025-26 Social Justice Champion. Losing the Kareem Abdul-Jabbar Trophy to the Miami star doesn’t diminish all the good work performed this season by Harrison Barnes.
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt: League announces Bam Adebayo as the 2025-26 Social Justice Champion. Losing the Kareem Abdul-Jabbar Trophy to the Miami star doesn’t diminish all the good work performed this season by Harrison Barnes.

items.title: Bam Adebayo is up to 6 All-Defensive selections and three All-Star selections.
items.author: Couper Moorhead
items.body_excerpt:
Bam Adebayo is up to 6 All-Defensive selections and three All-Star selections.

The only players to meet that criteria who are *not* currently in the Hall of Fame:

Rudy Gobert
Draymond Green
Chris Paul
Norm Van Lier
Kawhi Leonard
LeBron James
Alvin Robertson
